title: ASR Outdoor 2 in 1 Stainless Steel Shark Full Tang Fixed Blade Survival Knife
description:
If you're looking for a unique survival or EDC knife, this shark shaped, full tang, drop point blade with 550 paracord wrapped handle could be just the one. Don't let the shark shape fool you, it makes for a surprisingly comfortable and ergonomic hold, whether you're using it as an EDC knife, to include with hiking or camping gear, or putting together survival kits. Plus, the pocket knife is super lightweight, weighing in at only 0.15lbs, making it easy to pack and a cinch to carry.

ASR Outdoor 2 in 1 Stainless Steel Shark Full Tang Fixed Blade Survival Knife

If you're looking for a unique survival or EDC knife, this shark shaped, full tang, drop point blade with 550 paracord wrapped handle could be just the one. Don't let the shark shape fool you, it makes for a surprisingly comfortable and ergonomic hold, whether you're using it as an EDC knife, to include with hiking or camping gear, or putting together survival kits. Plus, the pocket knife is super lightweight, weighing in at only 0.15lbs, making it easy to pack and a cinch to carry.

Key Features

  • UNIQUE SURVIVAL KNIFE: Don't let the shark deceive you; the unique shape makes for a comfortable and ergonomic hold whether you're using it for survival, hunting, bushcraft, EDC or other; this ASR Outdoor survival knife is made from durable stainless steel, boasts a stealthy matte black finish with white shark teeth and features a full tang body design with drop point blade
  • PARACORD WRAP HANDLE: Among emergency preparedness items, 550 paracord is one of the top survival tools you'll want pack, as it can be used for everything from fishing lines to tourniquets, to tent tie downs and shoelaces, to name just a few of paracords many applications; this 2 in 1 fixed blade knife multitool with paracord handle is a must have for any outdoor adventure
  • STAINLESS STEEL SHARK DESIGN: This survival knife features a unique and cool shark design with a shark shaped knife body, gill and eye cut outs, defined fins and white teeth; If you love sharks, this is a fun collectible item or could make a great gift item for any shark lovers
  • FIXED BLADE KNIFE WITH SHEATH: This stainless steel pocket knife comes with a nylon pouch for safe storage when not in use; the case features a secure snap closure to hold the knife in place and a tunnel loop belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6 x 2.75 x 0.25 inches; Weight: 0.15lbs; Color: Black; Finish: Matte; Material: Stainless Steel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KB232TWHWT
  • UPC: 810058488800

This ASR Outdoor survival knife is made from durable stainless steel and boasts a stealthy matte black finish with painted on white shark teeth. And as mentioned, in addition to the unique design, this pocket knife comes with 550 paracord wrapped around the upper portion of the handle. Among emergency preparedness items, 550 paracord is one of the top survival tools you'll want pack, as it can be used for everything from fishing lines to tourniquets, to tent tie downs and shoelaces, to name just a few of paracords many applications; this 2 in 1 fixed blade knife multitool with paracord handle is a must have for any outdoor adventure!

The stainless steel pocket knife also comes with a perfectly fitted and durable nylon pouch for safe storage and protection when not in use; the case features a secure snap closure to hold the knife in place and a tunnel loop belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options.

This survival knife features a unique and cool shark design with a shark shaped knife body, gill and eye cut outs, defined fins and white teeth; If you love sharks, this is a fun collectible item or could make a great gift item!
